work_unit: MC-003 config read TOCTOU fix (derived from audit-2026-07-07-028)
situation: Audit-028 finding MC-003: load_config() calls canonicalize(path) to derive base_dir, then reads from original `path` instead of canonicalized `abs`. Narrow TOCTOU window allows config.yaml replacement between the two syscalls. Low severity (admin-controlled file) but defense-in-depth gap.
action: Changed read_to_string(path) → read_to_string(&abs) in config.rs:512. Error message also uses abs.display(). Added comment explaining the TOCTOU closure. When canonicalize fails, abs falls back to path (unwrap_or_else), so behavior is unchanged on non-canonicalizable paths.
outcome_evidence: Commit b87e287 on auto/opt-moni-core-1783359735, pushed to origin. Diff: +5/-2 lines, single file. read_to_string now uses &abs (canonicalized path).
next_suggestion: Dispatch MC-004 (no upper-bound sanity checks on fees/ratios in config validation, config.rs:373, low direction-shift). After both pending fixes merged, set audit-cycle-state status=cycle-complete to trigger next full audit.

audit_findings.finding: TOCTOU between canonicalize() and read_to_string() — read used original path instead of canonicalized abs
audit_findings.remediation: Read from &abs instead of path; error message also uses abs.display()
